title: E2E: cargo build succeeds + clippy clean
description:
Validate the full build pipeline and code quality for jmap-chat-egui.

What: Ensure the binary compiles cleanly with zero warnings under clippy.

Algorithm:
1. cargo build -p jmap-chat-egui
2. cargo clippy --all-features -p jmap-chat-egui -- -D warnings
3. cargo fmt --check -p jmap-chat-egui (or --all scoped)
4. cargo test -p jmap-chat-egui (all unit+integration tests pass)
5. Fix any issues found before closing this bead.

Defensive rules:
- Do not suppress warnings with #[allow(...)]; fix the root cause.
- If a clippy lint is a false positive, document why in a comment.

Acceptance: all 4 commands exit 0 with zero errors.
acceptance_criteria: cargo build, clippy, fmt, test all exit 0 for jmap-chat-egui
close_reason: cargo build+clippy+fmt+test all pass; 81 tests total
